properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have never walked on water Felt the waves beneath by faith but At your world Lord I'll receive your Faith to walk on ocean deep.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I remember how you found me In the very same place All my failing Surely would have downed me Still you way made a way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are my freedom, Jesus you're the reason, I'm kneeling again at your throne Where would I be without you Here in my life Here in my life

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You have said that all the heavens Sing for joy at one who finds the Way to freedom truth of Jesus Bought from death into his life.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are my freedom, Jesus you're the reason.
